mapper.select: SELECT C.CATEGORY_NAME FROM GENRE G INNER JOIN CATEGORY C ON G.CATEGORY_ID = C.CATEGORY_ID WHERE MOVIE_ID = 'MV-20260227-000001'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO GENRE ( GENRE_ID , MOVIE_ID , CATEGORY_ID) VALUES ( 'GN-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD-') || LPAD(SEQ_GENRE_PK.NEXTVAL, 6, '0') , #{movieId} , #{categoryId})
